reasoning: Initial 47 tokens + 3 retries x 12 tokens = 47 + 36 = 83.
3 workers in parallel, 21 tasks means 7 tasks per worker. 7 x 8 = 56 minutes.
30 days x 24 x 60 = 43200 minutes. Downtime = 0.5% x 43200 = 216 minutes.
Agent A: 4 min/task. Agent B 50% slower: 6 min/task. Working in parallel one each at a time, 14 tasks split: 7 each. A finishes 7 in 28 min, B in 42 min. Max = 42.
Net drain = 80 - 50 = 30 per second. 1000/30 = 33.33 seconds.
Extraction 5 min. Transformation 30% x 5 = 1.5 min. Loading 2 x 1.5 = 3 min. Subtotal = 9.5. Validation 15% overhead: 9.5 x 1.15 = 10.925.

600/min limit, current 540 used. Remaining budget = 60 requests for this window.
25% of 12 = 3 reserved. Production = 12 - 3 = 9.
500/8 = 62.5, round up to 63 tasks per worker. 63 x 2 = 126 minutes.
Budget 1,000,000 - 148 overhead = 999,852. Each message uses 230 tokens (encoded). 999852/230 = 4347.18... floor = 4347.
30% of 200 = 60 errors. Half = 30 retryable.
8 min = 480 sec. 5000 rps x 480 = 2,400,000 requests. 60% errors = 1,440,000 failed.

Per-item: A 0.005, B 0.008, C 0.003 min. Pipelined: total = A for all (5 min) + B for last item (0.008) + C for last item (0.003). But B is slowest; bottleneck. End-to-end = first item through A+B+C (0.005+0.008+0.003=0.016) + remaining 999 items at bottleneck B rate (999 x 0.008 = 7.992) + C tail (0.003). Approx = 0.016 + 7.992 + 0.003 - 0.008 = ~8.003. Roughly 8 min plus small tail. Bottleneck dominates: B takes 8 min for all, plus C tail 0.003 after B finishes ~ 8.003. Round to 8.003.
